subcodes.first_line: O thou remnant of the Family of the Messiah! Thy letter hath reached Us and thy lamentation hath been heard. Praise be to God that thou art adorned with the ornament of love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا بقیه آل الملیح نامه ات رسید و ناله ات مسموع آمد حمد خدا را که بطراز حب
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
